title: SyncedSettings store with read-write capability
goal: Create an abstraction layer over Zotero.SyncedSettings for non-duplicate pairs with both read and write capability. Uses item keys for cross-device portability.
in_scope: Define NonDuplicateSyncPayload type: { v: 1, pairs: [[key1, key2], ...] }
Validate v field on read (unknown version = empty array + warning log)
Add Zotero.SyncedSettings type declarations in typings/global.d.ts
Tests: round-trip write-then-read, pair normalization, deduplication, unknown version handling, clear
acceptance: write() followed by read() returns the same pairs (round-trip test)
addPair() adds without duplicating existing pairs
removePair() removes exactly the specified pair
Pairs are always stored with keys sorted lexicographically
Reading a setting with v: 2 (unknown version) returns empty array and logs warning
Reading a non-existent setting returns empty array
Zotero.SyncedSettings type declarations compile without errors
